h1: Custom Backpacks for Teams, Events & Corporate Gifts
metaDescription: Order custom backpacks for your team or event. Choose from over 15 styles with full-color print or embroidery. Bulk pricing available. Get a quote today.
introHtml:
Custom backpacks are a practical and visible way to promote your brand. Made from durable materials like polyester, nylon, and recycled rPET, these bags stand up to daily use while keeping your logo front and center. Whether you need an affordable option for a large event or a premium pack for employee gifts, we offer over 15 styles to match your budget and branding goals.

From the slim Central Sling to the spacious Ogio Epic Pack, each backpack can be decorated with screen printing, embroidery, or full-color transfer. Choose from dozens of colorways and add custom zipper pulls or webbing for extra impact. Our business backpacks feature padded laptop compartments and organizer pockets, making them ideal for corporate giveaways or trade show swag.

Minimum orders start as low as 50 pieces for select styles, and production typically takes 10-15 business days after approval. Request a free quote online or call our team to discuss your design and timeline.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom backpacks?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by style. Economy models like the Budget Backpack start at 50 pieces, while premium packs like the RAINS Backpack require 100 or more. Contact us for specific MOQs.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for backpacks?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing, direct embroidery, full-color heat transfer, and woven labels. Embroidery works best on large flat panels, while full-color printing is ideal for detailed logos.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes. We can provide a blank sample for most styles for a small fee, which is refunded with your first order. Decorated samples are available on request.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 10-15 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders can be expedited to 5-7 days for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on your location.

faqs.q: Do you offer backpacks made from recycled materials?
faqs.a: Yes. The Arlo rPET Backpack is made from recycled plastic bottles. We also carry other eco-friendly options. Look for the rPET label in our product listings.

heroAltText: Group of custom backpacks with printed logos in various colors, including business backpacks and sport backpacks.
